title: The Blind Doe
content:
A poor half-blind Doe her one eye
    Kept shoreward, all danger to spy,
    As she fed by the sea,
    Poor innocent! she
    Was shot from a boat passing by.

    Watch On All Sides
meaning: About: Walter Crane was an English artist and book illustrator. He produced paintings, illustrations, children's books, ceramic tiles and other decorative arts.
